```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# input / output paths
# ----------------------------
input_file <- "input_files/wound_closure_all_human.csv"
output_dir <- "output/wound_closure"

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# read and format data
# ----------------------------
df <- read.csv(input_file)

df$Recombinant <- as.factor(df$Recombinant)
df$Experiment <- as.factor(df$Experiment)

# optional: set CTRL as reference level if present
if ("CTRL" %in% levels(df$Recombinant)) {
  df$Recombinant <- relevel(df$Recombinant, ref = "CTRL")
}

# save cleaned data copy
write.csv(df, file.path(output_dir, "wound_closure_all_human_cleaned.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# helper function to save text output
# ----------------------------
save_text_output <- function(object, file) {
  capture.output(object, file = file)
}

# ----------------------------
# model 1: raw cell front velocity
# ----------------------------
model_velocity <- lmer(Cell_front_velocity ~ Recombinant + (1 | Experiment), data = df)

velocity_summary <- summary(model_velocity)
velocity_anova <- anova(model_velocity)
emm_velocity <- emmeans(model_velocity, ~ Recombinant)

velocity_contrast_unadjusted <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(emm_velocity, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "CTRL")
)

velocity_contrast_bh <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(emm_velocity, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "CTRL", adjust = "BH")
)

# save model outputs
save_text_output(velocity_summary, file.path(output_dir, "model_velocity_summary.txt"))
save_text_output(velocity_anova, file.path(output_dir, "model_velocity_anova.txt"))

write.csv(velocity_contrast_unadjusted,
          file.path(output_dir, "model_velocity_contrasts_vs_CTRL_unadjusted.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(velocity_contrast_bh,
          file.path(output_dir, "model_velocity_contrasts_vs_CTRL_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# model 2: control-normalized percent
# ----------------------------
model_ctrl_percent <- lmer(CTRL_PERCENT ~ Recombinant + (1 | Experiment), data = df)

ctrl_percent_summary <- summary(model_ctrl_percent)
ctrl_percent_anova <- anova(model_ctrl_percent)
emm_ctrl_percent <- emmeans(model_ctrl_percent, ~ Recombinant)

ctrl_percent_contrast_bh <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(emm_ctrl_percent, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "CTRL", adjust = "BH")
)

# save model outputs
save_text_output(ctrl_percent_summary, file.path(output_dir, "model_ctrl_percent_summary.txt"))
save_text_output(ctrl_percent_anova, file.path(output_dir, "model_ctrl_percent_anova.txt"))

write.csv(ctrl_percent_contrast_bh,
          file.path(output_dir, "model_ctrl_percent_contrasts_vs_CTRL_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# optional summary table for plotting/reporting
# ----------------------------
summary_table <- df %>%
  group_by(Recombinant) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_experiments = n_distinct(Experiment),
    mean_cell_front_velocity = mean(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_cell_front_velocity = sd(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ctrl_percent = mean(CTRL_PERCENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_ctrl_percent = sd(CTRL_PERCENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(summary_table,
          file.path(output_dir, "summary_by_recombinant.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# plot 1: raw cell front velocity
# ----------------------------
p_velocity <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Recombinant, y = Cell_front_velocity)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Cell front velocity by recombinant",
    x = "Recombinant",
    y = "Cell front velocity"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cell_front_velocity_boxplot.pdf"),
       plot = p_velocity, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cell_front_velocity_boxplot.png"),
       plot = p_velocity, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ----------------------------
# plot 2: CTRL_PERCENT
# ----------------------------
p_ctrl_percent <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Recombinant, y = CTRL_PERCENT)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "CTRL-normalized wound closure by recombinant",
    x = "Recombinant",
    y = "CTRL_PERCENT"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ctrl_percent_boxplot.pdf"),
       plot = p_ctrl_percent, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ctrl_percent_boxplot.png"),
       plot = p_ctrl_percent, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ----------------------------
# plot 3: DRAXIN vs CTRL by experiment
# ----------------------------
df_draxin <- df %>%
  filter(Recombinant %in% c("CTRL", "DRAXIN"))

p_draxin_ctrl <- ggplot(df_draxin,
                        aes(x = Recombinant, y = CTRL_PERCENT, color = Experiment)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "DRAXIN vs CTRL across experiments",
    x = "Recombinant",
    y = "CTRL_PERCENT"
  )

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "draxin_vs_ctrl_by_experiment.pdf"),
       plot = p_draxin_ctrl, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "draxin_vs_ctrl_by_experiment.png"),
       plot = p_draxin_ctrl, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# optional: print key results to console
# ----------------------------
print(velocity_anova)
print(velocity_contrast_bh)

print(ctrl_percent_anova)
print(ctrl_percent_contrast_bh)
```
